calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Berthe Najjar(310-869-5362)via CourtCall, of Najjar & Associates for Hans J. Reinhardt, petitioner and moving party / Wayne K. Snodgrass (415-554-4675) of City Attorney's Office for Residential Retn Stabilization and Arbritration Board, respondent and opposing party

Respondent seeks clarification of the tentatiave ruling from the court. Tentative is clarified as requested. The tentative ruling is adopted as modified: RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBRITRATION's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is sustained. Petition failed to name indispensable party, the landlord and or successor landlord. And Statute of Limitations has run. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Continued To Dec-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The tentative ruling is adopted. RESPONDENT RESIDENTIAL RENT STABILIZATION AND ARBRITRATION's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION is Continued to December 17, 2012 at 9:30am to be heard in Department 501, the housing court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
